mapper.select: SELECT id as id, dealerName as dealerName, dealerLeader as dealerLeader, provinceCode as provinceCode, (select name from region where code = provinceCode) as provinceName, cityCode as cityCode, (select name from region where code = cityCode) as cityName, areaCode as areaCode, (select name from region where code = areaCode) as areaName, dealerPhone as dealerPhone, dealerAddress as dealerAddress, seller as seller FROM dealer LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dealer (dealerName, dealerLeader, dealerPhone, provinceCode, cityCode, areaCode, dealerAddress, seller) VALUES( #{dealerName}, #{dealerLeader}, #{dealerPhone}, #{provinceCode}, #{cityCode}, #{areaCode}, #{dealerAddress}, #{seller})
mapper.update: UPDATE dealer SET dealerName=#{dealerName}, dealerLeader=#{dealerLeader}, dealerPhone=#{dealerPhone}, provinceCode=#{provinceCode}, cityCode=#{cityCode}, areaCode=#{areaCode}, dealerAddress=#{dealerAddress}, seller=#{seller} WHERE id=#{id}
